title: 奇迹一刻 Surmount
description:
Follow usSina Weibo: CE-Asia 奇迹一刻-Surmount
Official QQ Group: 791842309

Об игреStoryWhat could happen in one short instant? Enough to take a nobody to the top, or beat down to the hell.

In my last year of high school, I was just one step away from my dream to become an e-sports player.

That game -- what became known as the "miracle moment" -- was supposed to be the beginning of everything, but it ended my dream.

I had already accepted this fact and even started to give up on myself.

That day, the team sent me an offer for a coaching position.

This is the story that I create the miracle of e-sports one more time together with them...

• Interview, then sign up! Meet with the favorite player offline, see their true image, then sign up.
• Choose your favorite players from the 15 players with unique characteristics to form your own e-sports team.

 
• Multiple identities and daily life: coach, student, and online game player.

• School attendance: Check attendance, do not skip class!

• Urban daily life: Internet cafe, board game hall, food court... Meet new friends.

• Online game world: login, travel the online game world, do the tasks.

• Start as friends, acquaintance, familiar, ambiguous, step by step to deepen the fetters of both sides, harvest the love finally.

• There would be 18 romance available characters, 12 of them can begin romance relationships so far, and the remaining 6 will update in the EA period.

• Love regardless of where they belong to, the enemy characters also could become romance object!

• Love drama: all the characters could be chased at the same time, who would be your final decision.

• Shuttle between real life and the online game world, explore the inner sides of players.

• Games, reality, social network, which side is the true self?

• In addition to cultivating players' basic attributes, players can also develop new classes to unlock different tactical line-up.

• The coach's self-cultivation is also very important! Improve coaching skills, can make the players into twice the result with half the effort.

• Build up diversified tactical strategies for the team, use superior tactics to defeat the opponent, win easily!

• Unique intelligence war: Conditions on the game are varied. Leading the intelligence war to develop the best strategy before the start of the game.

• Intense schedule: from tournament to tournament, efforts to improve the team in every round of the regular season rank, competing for the finals round ticket.

• 
Random game experience: luck is part of ability! Randomly generated game elements make each game experience different.
description_short: Surmount is a simulation game which is involved with moderate strategy on the subject of E-sports. You'll play as a college student who choose to return back to the league and win the competition as a coach. Those members can not only be your teammate, but also close friends or lovers.
